programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Cris, Wendy, Natalie and Louis pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.(n)

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever (1971)
programme.desc: James Bond investigates a diamond-smuggling operation, and discovers that behind the scheme is his insidious arch-enemy Blofeld, who is planning to construct a devastating orbital doomsday weapon powered by the precious stones, which will force world powers to disarm and give him global domination. Spy adventure, starring Sean Connery, Jill St John, Charles Gray, Bernard Lee and Lois Maxwell.(n)

programme.desc: Part one of two. Quincy sets off on a cruise, looking forward to some well-earned rest and relaxation, but a mystery illness breaks out, killing off his fellow passengers.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Part one of two. Theo tries to enjoy a day off, but gets dragged into dealing with a body found in a stolen car and a woman plotting to kill her husband. William Hurt guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The sleuth investigates the case of a man who has acquired a well-paid but mysterious job - seemingly on account of his red hair. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and David Burke, with Eric Porter as Moriarty.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.sub-title: The Loneliness of the Long Distance Entrepreneur
programme.desc: A sudden staffing crisis leaves Arthur with no choice but to employ his nephew Ray to help him sell cut-price cars from Brussels - his idea of entering the European market. Drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie works alongside an old friend who once saved his life while serving in the SAS, and has difficulty coping with mounting evidence that his ex-colleague has joined the gang of Italian terrorists they are shadowing. Crime drama, starring Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter investigate when a fellow officer is coerced into acting as a getaway driver by the gangsters who have kidnapped his wife. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman, and featuring a guest appearance by Billy Murray.(n)

programme.title: When Football Changed Forever
programme.desc: The dramatic story of the 1991/92 Football League Division One season - the final campaign before the Premier League began. Leeds United overcame fierce rivals Manchester United to emerge as champions, thanks to a certain Frenchman named Eric Cantona.(n)

programme.title: RoboCop (1987)
programme.desc: A police officer in a future Detroit ravaged by crime is seemingly killed in the line of duty, but is rebuilt as a law-enforcing cyborg by the corporation that has taken over running the force. He begins to remember his human life and seeks to bring his killers to justice - a mission that leads him to turn on his corrupt corporate masters. Sci-fi thriller, starring Peter Weller, Nancy Allen, Ronny Cox and Miguel Ferrer.(n)

programme.title: Senna (2010)
programme.desc: Documentary about the life of Brazilian Formula One driver Ayrton Senna, examining his achievements on the track over a 10-year period that saw him crowned world champion three times, until his death in a crash during the 1994 San Marino Grand Prix. Featuring rare footage from the F1 archives and contributions from fellow racing stars including Alain Prost and Jackie Stewart.(n)

programme.title: The Plane Crash
programme.desc: Scientists, pilots and aviation experts participate in a staged aeroplane crash in a remote area of Mexican desert, hoping the exercise will reveal more about what happens to aircraft and their occupants during forced emergency landings. Pilot James 'JimBob' Slocum will put a Boeing 727 passenger jet on a crash course, parachuting out minutes before impact - with former US Navy pilot Leland 'Chip' Shanle then taking charge of the craft via remote control from a chase plane. After the crash, experts will analyse the site, along with data collected from cameras, instruments and hi-tech crash test dummies, to learn more about what happens when planes are forced out of the sky.(n)

programme.desc: Experts offer advice on how to walk away safely from an abusive relationship, and discuss ways to access the help and support available for victims of domestic abuse. programme.title: The Abused
programme.desc: Documentary telling the stories of Hazel and Kelly, who suffered physical abuse at the hands of their partners in Norfolk, following the police investigations into the crimes. At 45, Hazel thought she had found love, and tried to ignore the warning signs when her partner became increasingly controlling and violent. But then she was brutally attacked, with her abuser punching her and stamping on her head with reinforced boots. At first, Kelly denied her husband's behaviour to the police. It took several more attacks before she finally told the truth about his controlling and coercive nature, and his emotional and physical abuse.(n)

programme.desc: A prolific offender is landed with an eyewatering bill to square off three years of illegal travel, while the police must step in when one suspect is found in possession of a banned substance. At one of London's busiest stations, vigilant inspectors Scott and Michelle have success intercepting repeat offenders, but will they catch a notorious passenger who the station staff report comes through their station each day?(n)

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.sub-title: Paddington: A Year on the Tracks
programme.desc: Documentary following 12 months of Paddington train station and the Western network, following the staff, engineers, drivers and signalers who keep the railway running. Cheltenham races sees thousands of extra passengers arrive - many of whom fancy an early morning tipple - while chaos ensues when a passenger chases a fraudster round the station, accusing him of selling her out-of-date football tickets. In Swindon, the control room staff hear that heavy rainfall might cause flooding and block the mainline to Cornwall - leaving them facing a big decision.(n)

programme.title: Inside the Tube: Going Underground
programme.desc: Engineer and urban explorer Rob Bell examines the hidden story of how the world's oldest underground railway was built. He begins by exploring the construction of what is known today as the Northern Line, which runs 36 miles through London and connects the boroughs north and south of the Thames.(n)

programme.title: Air Force One (1997)
programme.desc: The American president is forced to take drastic measures to save his family when their plane is hijacked by Russian terrorists demanding the release of a jailed radical general. Meanwhile, the vice president tries to manage the crisis from Washington and has to decide whether to shoot the aircraft down. Action thriller, starring Harrison Ford, Gary Oldman, Glenn Close, Dean Stockwell and William H Macy.(n)

programme.title: Robin and Marian (1976)
programme.desc: Outlaw Robin Hood returns to England after the Crusades and goes in search of his beloved Marian, who is now an abbess, and crosses swords once again with old enemy the Sheriff of Nottingham. Medieval adventure, starring Sean Connery, Audrey Hepburn, Robert Shaw, Nicol Williamson, Ronnie Barker, Denholm Elliott and Richard Harris.(n)

programme.title: Three Faces West (1940)
programme.desc: An Austrian doctor and his daughter arrive in the dust bowl regions of America after fleeing the Nazis, and join the exodus of farmers seeking fertile land in Oregon. The daughter falls for the pioneer leading the journey, despite being engaged to the man who helped her escape the Third Reich. Drama, starring John Wayne, Charles Coburn and Sigrid Gurie.(n)

programme.title: Cottage to Let (1941)
programme.desc: A British inventor's revolutionary bombsight is set to have a positive impact on the war effort. However, military intelligence detects the Nazis are aware of the invention, while a plucky teenage cockney evacuated to the boffin's Scottish country estate sets out to expose a German spy ring. Second World War thriller, with Leslie Banks, John Mills, Alastair Sim and George Cole in his screen debut.(n)

programme.title: Kidnapped (1971)
programme.desc: A naive young man is cheated out of his inheritance by his conniving uncle, who sells him to the captain of a slave ship. On board he forms an alliance with a hardened rebel, and the pair make their escape when the ship is wrecked on the Scottish coast. Period adventure based on Robert Louis Stevenson's novel set during the Jacobite Uprising, with Michael Caine, Lawrence Douglas, Trevor Howard, Jack Hawkins and Donald Pleasence.(n)

programme.title: The Maze Runner (2014)
programme.desc: A teen arrives in an isolated community of youngsters, with no memory of who he is or the outside world. When another new arrival brings an ominous message, he realises time is running out for the group and they must find an escape route through a deadly labyrinth if they are to survive. Sci-fi adventure based on James Dashner's novel, starring Dylan O'Brien, Kaya Scodelario and Patricia Clarkson.(n)

programme.title: Wind River (2017)
programme.desc: A veteran hunter helps an FBI agent investigate the murder of a young woman on a Wyoming Native American reservation. Taylor Sheridan's crime drama, starring Jeremy Renner and Elizabeth Olsen.(n)

programme.title: Sleepless (2017)
programme.desc: Las Vegas cop Vincent Downs steals a 25kg shipment of cocaine from a violent casino boss, whose associates kidnap Downs' teenage son in retaliation. Downs is keen to return the drugs and see his son set free, but is hampered by having to dodge the attentions of an internal affairs officer. Action thriller, starring Jamie Foxx, Dermot Mulroney and Michelle Monaghan.(n)

programme.title: The Sacrifice (1986)
programme.desc: As his family gathers to celebrate his birthday as the threat of nuclear war looms, disillusioned intellectual Alexander tries to strike a bargain with God. Andrei Tarkovsky's final drama, starring Erland Josephson, Susan Fleetwood and Allan Edwall. In Swedish, French and English.(n)

programme.title: Millions Like Us (1943)
programme.desc: A woman is happy to be called up for service during the Second World War, but disappointed to learn she will be working in a factory making aircraft parts. However, the new job brings romance in the shape of a handsome airman and a close circle of friends in her co-workers, who all rally round when tragedy strikes. Drama, starring Patricia Roc, Eric Portman, Gordon Jackson and Basil Radford.(n)

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone (1958)
programme.desc: A drifter rides into a town dominated by the members of a ruthless family. He befriends a Mexican in jail for killing a man who attacked his sister and tries to save him from the gallows, getting caught up in the evil clan's running internal conflicts in the process. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Craig Stevens, Manuel Rojas and Barry Kelley.(n)

programme.title: Campbell's Kingdom (1957)
programme.desc: A man who has only six months to live returns to the land his family owns in the Canadian Rockies. He intends to prove his grandfather's frequently derided theory that there is oil to be found there, but he has little time to find it, as the area will be flooded when construction is completed on a nearby dam. Adventure, with Dirk Bogarde, Stanley Baker, Michael Craig and Barbara Murray.(n)

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes (1969)
programme.desc: A second astronaut arrives on the strange simian-dominated world searching for his predecessor. As he journeys into the infamous forbidden zone, he discovers an underground cult of psychic mutants. Meanwhile, a military coup has taken place among the ape society, leading to an inevitable battle. Sci-fi sequel, with James Franciscus, Charlton Heston and Kim Hunter.(n)

programme.title: Warcraft (2016)
programme.desc: A kingdom stands on the brink of war when it is invaded by a vast horde of creatures who have travelled through a portal from their dying world. As dark magic works its influence on the world, two leaders from either side are set on a collision course with each other as they strive to protect their people. Fantasy adventure based on the best-selling computer game, starring Travis Fimmel, Paula Patton and Ben Foster.(n)

programme.title: Moonlight (2016)
programme.desc: A young African-American man in a rough Miami neighbourhood grapples with his identity and sexuality while experiencing the everyday struggles of childhood, adolescence and burgeoning adulthood. He finds support from a drug dealer and his kindly girlfriend, who can see he is being neglected and offer him sanctuary. Barry Jenkins' Oscar-winning drama, starring Mahershala Ali, Naomie Harris, Alex Hibbert, Ashton Sanders and Trevante Rhodes.(n)

programme.title: Chef (2014)
programme.desc: Carl Casper quits his job at a prestigious Los Angeles restaurant after refusing to compromise his creative integrity for the owner, and takes to the road to reignite his passion for the kitchen. He ends up in Miami, where he teams up with his ex-wife, his friend and his son to launch a food truck. Comedy, directed by and starring Jon Favreau, with Robert Downey Jr, Scarlett Johansson and Dustin Hoffman.(n)

programme.title: Tangerine (2015)
programme.desc: Transgender prostitute Sin-Dee Rella returns to her West Hollywood neighbourhood on Christmas Eve following a stint in jail, only to discover that her pimp boyfriend Chester has slept with another woman while she was incarcerated. Despite her trans best friend Alexandra's efforts to calm her down, Sin-Dee is determined to hunt the woman down. Comedy drama shot entirely with iPhones, starring Kitana Kiki Rodriguez, Mya Taylor, Karren Karagulian and James Ransone.(n)

programme.title: Two Thousand Women (1944)
programme.desc: Female prisoners struggle to cope with living in a German internment camp, but find common cause in making life difficult for their captors. When three British airmen are shot down over the prison, they keep them hidden from the Germans while plotting a way to smuggle them out safely. Second World War comedy, with Phyllis Calvert, Flora Robson, Patricia Roc and Renee Houston.(n)

programme.title: Thoroughly Modern Millie (1967)
programme.desc: A naive woman leaves her rural roots behind to seek fortune and romance in 1920s New York. She finds work as a secretary to a business tycoon, but he happens to be madly in love with her friend. However, before long she is wooed instead by a smitten salesman. Meanwhile, back at her boarding house, she stumbles across a shocking criminal enterprise involving the landlady. Musical comedy, with Julie Andrews, James Fox and Mary Tyler Moore.(n)

programme.title: This Happy Breed (1944)
programme.desc: A working-class family moves into a new suburban home after the father returns from service in the First World War. However, the couple and their children struggle to adjust to life higher up the social ladder. David Lean's drama, adapted by Noel Coward from his play, starring Robert Newton, Celia Johnson, Robert Stanley Holloway and John Mills.(n)

programme.title: Mud (2012)
programme.desc: Two boys exploring an island on the Mississippi discover a fugitive has made his home there. He tells them he is on the run from bounty hunters after killing a man, and needs their help to be reunited with his lost love. As they ferry messages to the woman in question, the youngsters are forced to come to terms with the complexity of adult relationships. Drama, starring Matthew McConaughey and Reese Witherspoon.(n)

programme.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral (1994)
programme.desc: A London man's misfortunes in love look set to change when he meets an American beauty. However, the prospect of a transatlantic relationship succeeding seems slim, so the pair go their separate ways - only for him to realise he is unable to get her out of his mind. Richard Curtis's comedy, with Hugh Grant, Andie MacDowell, John Hannah, Charlotte Coleman, Kristin Scott Thomas, Simon Callow and James Fleet.(n)

programme.title: The Diary of a Teenage Girl (2015)
programme.desc: A girl growing up in 1970s San Francisco looks for a sense of certainty in a rapidly changing world. She finds solace in an affair with her mother's boyfriend, but also finds a personal refuge in developing her own artistic talents. Drama based on Phoebe Gloeckner's novel, starring Bel Powley, Alexander Skarsgard and Kristen Wiig.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: When Sabrina realises she has been turning down guys left and right since her breakup with Harvey, she casts a spell ensuring that she will say 'yes' every time she is asked out.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina runs into her evil twin Katrina, who steals her Other Realm passport and visits the mortal world to wreck her life by doing terrible things to her friends and family.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Ryder is upset when he discovers his friends have deleted him from their profiles on social media websites, and Lennox is determined to beat Zander's test scores. Meanwhile, Joe begins to date Mel's high-maintenance friend Anita (Shannon Elizabeth). Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel desperately tries to act like a cool aunt after discovering that Lennox and Zander have taken their relationship to the next level, but Joe just wants to kill the boyfriend. Meanwhile, Ryder's girlfriend Keira is impressed by his undeserved bad boy reputation, but her parents are not. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Tucker take baby Emma for a doctor's appointment, and Ben decides to ask a nurse at the surgery out on a date. Danny prepares for his first hockey game with the New York Rangers, and his superstitious rituals include carrying an old high-school jersey that has never been washed to the event. However, things go wrong when Tucker accidentally launders the lucky jersey. Comedy, starring Derek Theler.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: The guys appreciate Bonnie's help, but struggle to cope when she begins to turn up at the flat unexpectedly. Ben and Danny decide to take baby Emma over to Riley's place, but end up sabotaging her latest date. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard devise a contest to decide whether Sheldon or Kripke should get Professor Rothman's vacant corner office. Meanwhile, Penny receives the gift of a painting from Amy to celebrate their friendship, but discreetly tries to dispose of it with help from Bernadette.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon refuses to get his hair cut as his regular barber is in a coma - a solitary change that causes chaos in the rest of his well-ordered life. Meanwhile, Howard undergoes a gruelling Nasa training programme in Houston, Texas, meaning he can only communicate with Bernadette via the internet.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam has a birthday sleepover, during which his friend Garry shares out some of his father's home-brewed beer and makes everyone sick. Meanwhile, Barry and Erica want a new CD player, but Murray tells them he will only buy one for them if they write the greatest song ever.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly discovers Adam is failing in Spanish class, and immediately blames his teacher. However, when she arranges for him to receive extra tuition, her plan backfires.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Captain Holt clash over the merits of Holt's newly hired assistant. Jeffords, Santiago, Diaz and Boyle attempt to do something about the cluttered and dirty communal office space at the 99th precinct.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago investigate a difficult 'he said, she said' case. Captain Holt becomes suspicious that a cunning escape from jail has taken place after discovering that his lifelong criminal arch-nemesis has died in a prison transport accident.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Howard face problems when they file for a patent for their infinite persistence gyroscope. Plus, Penny, Amy and Bernadette give Raj dating advice when Emily reaches out to him after their breakup. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is shocked at a revelation from Sheldon after she buys him a new laptop, while Raj sells out Leonard and Howard after they lie to their wives in order to attend an early screening of a movie. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Zander asks Lennox to work with him on a creative project, despite the fact their relationship is currently on hold. Meanwhile, Mel believes it is a good idea for her and Joe to take their new relationship slowly - but he upsets her when he gets another job and moves out of the house. Family comedy starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel becomes frustrated when Joe's demanding new job prevents the pair spending time together. She sneaks over to see him at work, but runs the risk of getting him fired. Meanwhile, Ryder witnesses a robbery and discovers that his interview with the local news team has been turned into a video that has gone viral. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Tucker are keen to throw Bonnie out of the building when she sets up her new apartment across the hall from the boys, and decide to throw a huge, noisy party to annoy her. Meanwhile, Danny asks Riley for advice on how to split with Milena, but winds up in a compromising position. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau and Melissa Peterman.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Against Bonnie's advice, Ben persuades Danny to sign a sponsorship deal with a company that makes a brand of energy drink - but things go wrong at a photoshoot. Meanwhile, Riley takes an interest in volunteering and accepts a job helping out at the hospital. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Desperate circumstances call for desperate measures as Peralta, Captain Holt, Santiago, Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle are forced to ally themselves with some old enemies.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Detective Jake Peralta and his eclectic group of colleagues at Brooklyn's 99th Precinct are used to having a commanding officer who doesn't make them work too hard or follow the rules too closely. That all changes when tightly wound Captain Ray Holt takes over, determined to make the dysfunctional squad into the best in the borough. Pilot episode of the American comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam goes to great lengths to dodge swimming classes, but his plan to avoid the sport could affect his friendship with Dave. Jealousy prompts Barry to undermine Erica when she attempts to make the world a better place by forming a school social awareness club.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Murray grows a moustache, it ignites a feud between his wife Beverly and his best friend Bill. Barry is convinced that he's lost Lainey's affections when Erica tells him that his girlfriend is in love with Culture Club singer Boy George. David Koechner guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette decide they do not want to know the gender of their unborn child, but are upset when they hear Raj has found out before they have. After Amy's apartment floods, she proposes a cohabitation experiment with Sheldon to stay with him while her apartment undergoes repairs.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Things don't run smoothly as Amy and Sheldon's cohabitation experiment continues, forcing Leonard and Penny to intervene when the couple have an argument about the 'bathroom schedule'. Howard and Bernadette cancel their holiday plans when Bernadette feels unwell and decide to have a secret stay-cation at home instead. However, the pair are soon disturbed by unexpected guests dropping by.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Abz Love hosts the second of the week's dinner parties with a little help from his mother, hoping to impress guests Jack Fincham, Dani Harmer, Mark Francis and Donna and Verona.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and the squad must track down a hacker who has infiltrated the precinct's servers, compromising protected information on undercover agents. Rosa deals with relationship issues, while Hitchcock and Scully attempt to cook the perfect lasagne.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy is back - and this time things between him and Jake are personal. Amy and Charles try to find the perfect new vending machine for the Nine-Nine.(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will plans to celebrate his birthday with a grown-up dinner, but his friends face a dilemma when they discover the event clashes with a more popular party. They end up gatecrashing the rival gathering, only to find that Simon's French exchange student steals the limelight.(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will tries to reinvent the boys' image by taking them clubbing around London, but Simon is unsure whether to go until Carli shows an interest in the outing. When the friends arrive in the West End, their efforts to appear cool are hampered by aggressive bouncers, a tramp and some angry bus passengers.(n)

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Erin, Clare, Michelle, Orla and James are beside themselves with excitement as they have tickets to see boyband Take That in Belfast. When Ma Mary forbids them to go, they decide that they will stop at nothing to get there and see their idols in concert. Comedy from writer Lisa McGee, set against the Troubles in early-1990s Northern Ireland, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Nicola Coughlan, Jamie-Lee O'Donnell, Louisa Harland and Dylan Llewellyn.(n)

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: The Quinns cause uproar at a family wedding, and when the girls - and James - fail to behave themselves at the reception, the consequences are very serious indeed, especially for poor cousin Eammon (played by guest star Ardal O'Hanlon). Comedy from writer Lisa McGee, set against the Troubles in early-1990s Northern Ireland, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Nicola Coughlan, Jamie-Lee O'Donnell, Louisa Harland and Dylan Llewellyn.(n)

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Moss decides his life is stagnating and enrols on a German cookery course to meet new people. Elsewhere, Jen discovers the only place she can have a cigarette is in a smoking area that bears a sinister resemblance to Soviet Russia. Comedy, starring Chris O'Dowd, Richard Ayoade and Katherine Parkinson.(n)

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Jen finds love in the form of Peter, and prepares a dinner party to introduce him to six of their single friends. Unfortunately, the three male guests drop out at the last minute, leaving her facing an awkward choice between cancelling or drafting in Moss, Roy and Richmond as replacements. Sitcom, starring Richard Ayoade, Chris O'Dowd and Katherine Parkinson, with Noel Fielding and Sarah Hadland.(n)

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Some of Chelsea's residents gather in Saint-Tropez for the launch of Victoria's swimwear range, and Spencer is keen to put his partying days behind him and patch things up with Louise - but new love rival Andy could scupper his plans. Meanwhile, back in the UK, Cheska and Binky become alarmed at Ollie's strange behaviour and Richard is spotted around town with a mystery blonde on his arm.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After spending the holidays apart, the gang get together to hear about Sheldon's and Amy's trip to his mother's, Leonard and Penny recall their Christmas tree adventure, and Howard and Bernadette open up about their first days as parents.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny thinks that Leonard is taking her for granted and has stopped making an effort in their relationship, so she decides to go away for a spa weekend with Amy. Howard and Raj go to extreme lengths to deal with a squeaky floorboard in the baby's bedroom.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey tells her unattractive friend Liz that Jeff fancies her, but it backfires when the duo are left alone at dinner and her husband suffers an allergic reaction. Adam tries to hide his snacks from a dieting Jennifer, while Timmy introduces Russell to charity work.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Russell finally gets the chance to confess his feelings for Suneetha when Timmy breaks off the engagement, while Audrey discovers Jeff used to date a competitive dancer after he takes an interest in her favourite reality TV programme. Comedy, starring David Spade and Patrick Warburton.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are teamed together to write a story in an effort to land a sought-after spot on the school newspaper.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Salem falls for a college girl, while Sabrina throws a Hallowe'en party - where Roxie jeopardises the relationship between Frankenstein's monster and his gruesome bride. Supernatural sitcom, starring Melissa Joan Hart.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel tries to gain votes by co-hosting a local TV show with Joe, and their on-camera bickering makes them an instant hit. But their popularity begins to have an effect on Lennox and Ryder, so they must decide on whether fame or family is more important. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel's new boyfriend Noah temporarily moves in to her apartment while his is being renovated, and Lennox starts a dream internship at a local newspaper - but struggles to wake up in time for work.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben enlists Riley's help to prove to the bar's owner that he is responsible enough to fill the new manager's job, but his tactic of posing as a family man soon backfires. Bonnie buys baby Emma a very girly pushchair, but Tucker and Danny exchange it for one they believe to be much cooler in the hope of attracting the attention of women.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.sub-title: Take Her Out of the Ballgame
programme.desc: Riley stands in as captain of softball league team after they keep losing, but her competitive side soon takes over and she starts taking the role too seriously, while Danny finds out that Bonnie is dating his hockey coach.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is disappointed with Sheldon when he announces he is breaking his promise to go with her to a birthday party in favour of joining the boys for a Star Wars video-game marathon. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny buys Leonard and Sheldon some Star Trek action figures, but the duo refuse to remove them from the packaging in case their value is diminished. Elsewhere, Raj is desperate to find someone to accompany him to a wedding and asks his parents to find him a date. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As the 1984 presidential election approaches, Erica discovers that Beverly always just votes for the same candidate as Murray, and she sets out to educate her mother. Barry wants to appear on a sporty game show to prove his athletic prowess to his friends.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray seems keen when Adam announces he wants to take up a new activity at school - until he discovers it is fencing. Beverly tries her hand at matchmaking. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta helps Santiago to navigate the complicated relationship that she has with her brother David. Boyle introduces some drama into an undercover mission involving Jeffords and Captain Holt.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A visitor from Latvia causes Charles and Jake to investigate Nikolaj's family. Holt and Amy bring in famed forensic scientist Dr Yee to help close a case for Rosa.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: On a weekend cabin trip with Penny and Amy, Sheldon spills one of Leonard's secrets, while Howard and Bernadette must draw a line when Raj goes overboard with pregnancy gifts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon disagree over whether to continue holding their regular Roommate Agreement meetings, with Leonard suggesting they are no longer required, while Sheldon believes they are still essential. As the pair's squabble quickly escalates into a full-blown argument, the rest of their friends turn up for a planned Game of Thrones viewing party, and end up taking sides in the dispute - resulting in two warring factions taking up residence in 4A and 4B. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: After winning a 10-course dining experience in a raffle, Mel decides to join an exercise boot camp to lose some weight before she gorges on the gourmet meal - and she even manages to persuade Joe to teach the class. Meanwhile, Lennox and Zander try to sell their web series. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel receives some bad publicity due to Joe when he shares too much with the press at a function, while Ryder decides to ask Stella out on a date, and Lennox and Zander make a big decision about their future.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Dr Shaw decides that Riley is the reason Danny cannot focus during ice hockey and bans her from his next match. Meanwhile, Riley worries things are moving too fast with Fitch, and Tucker competes with Jenna for a promotion at work. Comedy, starring Chelsea Kane.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben tries to get Emma into daycare by flirting with the assistant manager, Megan, who insists there is no space, until she thinks that Ben and Tucker are a gay couple. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: For the first time in his career, Jake has a growing number of cases he just can't seem to solve, and the other detectives worry his run of bad luck will rub off on them. Raj gathers his ex-girlfriends together so that they can give him some dating advice.(n)

programme.desc: Penny buys Leonard and Sheldon some Star Trek action figures, but the duo refuse to remove them from the packaging in case their value is diminished. programme.desc: Jeff reluctantly attends a video-game launch party when Audrey invites her friends round, and Timmy is amused to discover Russell is the inspiration for the title. Comedy, starring Patrick Warburton and Megyn Price.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle brings Peralta into a case when a psychiatrist reports one of his patients missing, while Santiago believes she has accidentally received a package meant for Jeffords.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Work has become so busy for Peralta and Santiago that they end up celebrating their first wedding anniversary while standing guard over a comatose drugs baron who has been rushed into hospital after being shot.(n)

programme.desc: The gang goes to a bar and runs into Penny's old boyfriend Zack, while Bernadette is left to spend the evening with Sheldon when she cannot go wine tasting with the others. programme.desc: Sheldon discovers a surprise screening of The Avengers is scheduled at a local cinema, complete with a Q&A session with the film's director, Joss Whedon. Meanwhile, Leonard's mother Beverly arrives in town for an extended visit, and Penny takes the opportunity to bond with her new mother-in-law - and to make up for not inviting her to the wedding. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.desc: Sheldon goes to great lengths to convince Amy that they should have a baby together after they successfully complete a scientific experiment using their DNA samples. Raj is too embarrassed to tell his friends what the new woman in his life does for a living.(n)

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: High-definition cameras and aerial photography techniques are used to explore the archipelago, which is rich in wildlife and made famous by Charles Darwin's On the Origin of the Species. This programme focuses on the geological history of the islands through the evidence of volcanic eruptions and examines what makes it unique. Tilda Swinton narrates.(n)

programme.title: Spy in the Wild
programme.desc: Natural history documentary in which spy cameras camouflaged as various animals go 'undercover' in the animal world, getting up close and personal to film their behaviour. Spy Pup is immersed in wild dog life to explore their maternal love, and Spy Penguin records the turbulent action of the mating season, as a male Adelie penguin falls victim to a pebble thief that ruins his chances of love for the season. Spy Tortoise and Spy Bushbaby keep watch on chimpanzees, while in perhaps the most moving scenes, Spy Monkey becomes the focus of attention for a troop of concerned langurs who believe the motionless camera-creature has died.(n)

programme.title: Impossible Railways
programme.desc: The wilderness lines that have pushed the frontiers of human endeavour into previously unknown territories, solving a set of complex problems along the way.(n)

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The story of Hitler's personal secretary Martin Bormann and the efforts to track him down. With insufficient evidence to confirm the Nazi official's death, the International Military Tribunal at Nuremberg tried him in absentia during 1946 and eventually sentenced him to death. Despite extensive efforts, he was never found and was eventually presumed to have died in May 1945.(n)

programme.desc: The infamous Borgia family was devastated when favourite son Juan was murdered in 1497. Here, modern experts set about cracking the case and fingering the killer.(n)

programme.title: Operation Gold Rush with Dan Snow
programme.desc: Dan Snow, Felicity Aston and Dr Kevin Fong finally arrive at the end of their gruelling journey in Dawson City. They set up a traditional mining camp in the heart of the gold fields, before facing their next challenge. They have just five days to find gold in an area that has already been heavily mined, and can only use the back-breaking methods of the 19th-century early pioneers.(n)

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston looks at the life and work of Serbian inventor Nikola Tesla, investigating conspiracy theories that the scientific establishment and national governments covered up his work on energy sources. He also finds out why so little evidence of his experiments remains today.(n)

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The story of Hitler's personal secretary Martin Bormann and the efforts to track him down. With insufficient evidence to confirm the Nazi official's death, the International Military Tribunal at Nuremberg tried him in absentia during 1946 and eventually sentenced him to death. Despite extensive efforts, he was never found and was eventually presumed to have died in May 1945.(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The Allied offensive in the Pacific, where America's two-pronged attack led to heavy casualties on both sides, as the Japanese mounted a ferocious defence. Narrated by Laurence Olivier.(n)

programme.title: Impossible Railways
programme.desc: The wilderness lines that have pushed the frontiers of human endeavour into previously unknown territories, solving a set of complex problems along the way.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The stories behind an abandoned Second World War aviation facility in Farnborough, a Soviet airbase in the Gobi Desert, and a disused furnace in Pittsburgh.(n)

programme.title: Secrets of the Railways
programme.sub-title: Kiruna to Narvik - Hitler's Arctic Railway Line
programme.desc: The Nordland Line, the longest in Norway at 453 miles. Stretching between Trondheim and Bodo, it was first built to transport the country's greatest natural resource - iron ore.(n)

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: Examining the lesser-known parts of the islands and the species that have successfully evolved to suit the environment. The programme discovers how tortoise shells have changed shape, flowers have turned yellow to attract bees, and finches have become warblers. Plus, how flightless cormorants are still hunting underwater. Narrated by Tilda Swinton.(n)

programme.title: Spy in the Wild
programme.desc: Undercover cameras help to explore the world of animal intelligence, ingenuity and creativity in their hunting, protection and health. Spy Orang-utan meets her real-life counterparts in Borneo to capture how, living close to local people, they have gained unexpected skills in sawing wood and washing with soap, while Spy Termite catches one of the world's cleverest animal tricksters, the drongo, as he tries to outwit a group of meerkats in the battle for food.(n)

programme.title: The Green Green Grass

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on an expedition along Dorset's Jurassic coast to explore the county's hidden Second World War story. Starting beside the defences on Chesil Beach, he heads east to finish in Swanage and Studland Bay. On his five-day walk he encounters stunning scenery and uncovers wartime acts of ingenuity and bravery. He also discovers the crucial part a swannery played in developing a secret weapon and reveals the role of Dorset in protecting Britain from invasion during the conflict.(n)

programme.desc: The undercover cameras reveal how animals rely upon each other for a range of activities. Jasmine Harman selects three properties for their £150,000 budget in Wales, but Jonnie Irwin has three cracking options in the Mar Menor.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer

He competes in a noodle eating challenge against two internet celebrities, who have acquired a cult following for their ability to consume vast amounts of food. He also pays a visit to a sumo wrestling stable, where he bakes flatbreads for the fighters and sits down to dinner with the largest fighter in the history of the sport. He then takes a trip into the countryside to visit a farm for very expensive strawberries, and concludes the trip with Osaka's eat-till-you-drop food tour.(n)

programme.title: Walking with Elephants
programme.desc: Explorer, conservationist, author and presenter Levison Wood treks alongside hundreds of elephants on their annual migration across Botswana. He gets up close and personal for the first time with a group of orphans and takes part in an ancient ceremony, before setting off into the bush in search of a herd to follow. Following potentially dangerous encounters with a buffalo and a pride of lions, Lev finds his first herd, but is forced to leave them alone when one threatens to charge.(n)

Elsewhere, officers are confronted by an army of family and friends when they attempt to enforce a writ at the property of a debtor, and face a difficult eviction at the north London home of a heavily pregnant tenant and her family, after the council fails to pay the rent to the landlord.(n)

Brent Council housing enforcement officer Herb discovers 26 labourers living in life-threatening conditions in a single house, while letting agent John tries to find a solution for a tenant living in squalor due to an issue with hoarding.(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: This edition focuses on young people living on state welfare, including 18-year-old Dean from Harlow in Essex, who has no intention of getting a job unless forced. Twentysomethings Danielle and her boyfriend Josh are unable to work due to anxiety and depression and have moved to Blackpool to make a new start. However, with four children between them from previous relationships and another on the way they are struggling to make ends meet on a joint benefits income of around £100 a week.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary giving an insight into cash-strapped Britain from the perspectives of debtors, creditors and those who collect the payments, including High Court enforcement bailiffs and repossession teams. Paul and Ben are called in to evict squatters from a residential property, but something about the squat does not quite add up for the team.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Brian O'Shaughnessy and Graham Aldred's first case sees them in a Brighton health spa as they search for assets to seize in pursuit of a £20,000 debt. Following a stand-off, they devise a way to work with the owner and her professional advisers to come up with a solution. Later, Graham reveals his softer side when he revisits a woman who defaulted on a debt payment plan.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart McCracken and Elmore Victor head to Liverpool for what they expect to be a routine repossession, but instead face the most challenging eviction of their careers. Behind the front door, they find a critically ill two-year-old child with major heart problems, who is on constant life support and unable to breathe without a ventilator. Meanwhile, Brian O'Shaughnessy and Del Anglin chase £2,000 worth of debt owed by a business based in Kent, and recover £4,000 from a recycling business in Buckinghamshire. Plus, Stewart and Elmore encounter another family in crisis in Birmingham, where a retired couple who acted as guarantor for their daughter's tenancy are liable to pay over £3,000 after she defaulted.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Claudia is horrified that Andrea caused a prison riot and Elly caves in and accepts Andrea's help, but when Toadie learns who Elly's new cellmate is, his concern for her grows.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Dean is furious that Bella took his car and has been out all night, while Colby returns home from hospital to find that his sister has been skipping counselling.(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: When a body is found in woodland 12 hours after an elderly couple are reported missing, residents in a rural village react with shock at the thought of a killer in their midst. Police and forensic teams worked fast and quickly made an arrest, but soon another name was in the frame, although the search for this new suspect would lead detectives far and wide. One question remained, however. Where was the second body?(n)

programme.title: Killer Weather: Nature Fights Back
programme.desc: An extreme explorer was almost burned to death when acid rain caused by an erupting volcano fell on him and burned through his gear and clothing.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours

programme.sub-title: Money's Too Tight to Mention: On Benefits
programme.desc: Catching up with a few familiar faces to find out how their lives have changed. Doncaster man Carl has been living on benefits since a motorcycle accident left him with multiple injuries. Now he has become the drummer in a band for musicians with disabilities. Karen and Paul lost their launderette business and are now rebuilding their home - the only problem is, they believe the house is haunted - and things are looking up for newlyweds Andy and Diane.(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.sub-title: On Benefits: To Heat or to Eat?
programme.desc: A single father with six children cannot afford to both feed his family and heat their home, while a man who was seriously injured in a car accident more than 10 years ago struggles to prove to the authorities that he is unable to work, and a woman setting up a fortune telling business faces an uncertain future.(n)

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Homeless
programme.desc: Twenty-four-year-old Jay, who works in finance and loves splashing his cash on clothes and cars, agrees to live on the streets of London for three nights.(n)

programme.title: Ocean's Twelve (2004)
programme.desc: The crooks reunite when an old enemy catches up with them and demands they repay the money they stole from him three years previously. In response, the gang comes up with another larcenous plan - but reckons without the interventions of a fellow thief and a sultry Interpol agent. Crime caper sequel, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Catherine Zeta-Jones, Matt Damon, Andy Garcia and Don Cheadle.(n)

programme.desc: Part two of two. Shocked at the sight of Cate with another man, Bridget and Kerry decide not to visit their grandmother and take to the open road to try to sort out their feelings.(n)

programme.title: 8 Simple Rules
programme.desc: Cate is furious with Bridget for going to CJ's college party, and Jim has to take a written driver's test after police discover his licence has expired. With Katey Sagal and David Spade.(n)

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Part two of two. After catching Junior and his girlfriend Vanessa getting up to no good, Michael and Jay throw him out of the house, and he ends up living in a tent in the back garden until everything has calmed down.(n)

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael is recruited for jury service and elected foreman, but tries to get the trial over quickly so he can rush home to watch a marathon showing of the Godfather films on TV. Unfortunately, he ends up having to rent the videos instead - and becomes convinced the Mafia are after him.(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The story of a couple Simon and Emma, who moved to a peaceful town in the east of Scotland, where they received a less than cheery welcome from their neighbours, and soon suspected the animosity they faced had something to do with their 11 children and two huskies. Plus, a feud that erupted after a fuchsia bush threatened to scratch one homeowner's beloved classic car in Portsmouth, and a tit-for-tat dispute over a boundary fence in a Manchester suburb, leading to the erection of an ugly concrete barrier.(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: Life on the dole in Scotland, including aspiring pop stars Zedd and Saffire, who live in Portobello, Edinburgh and receive £17,000 a year in benefits. After a failed attempt to start her own business in Australia, Kit is back in her home town of Wishaw, North Lanarkshire, to sign on and stay with friends, while Stirling resident Kirsty is desperate for work and is convinced her weight and mild learning disability are stopping her from getting a job. The 30-year-old's stay-at-home parents Rosie and Desmond believe that discrimination is to blame.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve's first job is an eviction with a twist when they find out the landlord is the tenant's son, while their next case is also tricky and involves family members with a question mark over their immigration status who are now facing homelessness. Their final case involves a man with a history of mental illness who has reached the end of his tenancy but refuses to leave, and Steve tries to find a solution after a church minister and his mother fail to placate him.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection. Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy try to collect a debt from a technology company, but with the director nowhere to be seen, the office manager does everything she can to prove the business is no longer trading. Stewart McCracken and Elmor Victor face a heartbreaking house repossession in Merseyside, where two landlords are forced to evict a tenant recovering from a brain tumour which has cost him his job and income.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Delroy and Kevin face a web of deceit in an Italian delicatessen in south London as they chase a huge debt amounting to £29,000. Meanwhile, Steve and Paul must evict a tenant in north London who has not paid her rent for over 18 months, before heading to Cambridgeshire to make one of their most emotional evictions to date. Plus, Brian and Delroy track down a pensioner in Surrey who owes £15,000 for a business he bought four years ago.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Australian soap opera, charting the lives and loves of the residents of the suburb of Erinsborough.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Ben Reeve from Lewisham Council's Rogue Landlord Unit aims to help Lola, who stopped paying rent 18 months earlier in an effort to get her negligent landlord to deal with her dilapidated flat's many problems. Eviction specialists also come to the aid of Amit, who found himself continuing his late father's battle with a nightmare renter, and 70-year-old landlady Joan, who started receiving unnerving threats from her rent-skipping tenant after she started legal proceedings to get him evicted.(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: A father-of-three who is £30,000 in debt has to decide whether to accept a job offer that could help him clear his debts, or whether he would be better off staying on benefits. A debt-laden aspiring rapper hopes that a chance meeting with a music manager will be his ticket to fame and fortune. A single mother who had her benefits slashed for not declaring her nightclub singer income faces eviction if she doesn't pay her rent arrears.(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions, focusing on criminals in London involved in robberies, thefts, drug crimes, street brawls and weapons offences. In Soho, police officers monitor the activity of the area's 100,000 nightly visitors from a CCTV control room in an underground bunker, while in Lambeth the air support unit is called in when an armed gang are seen rampaging through the streets.(n)

programme.title: Sex on the Streets
programme.desc: Documentary examining the lives of three sex workers. Storm Huntley uncovers the spectrum of escort experiences, from tales of empowerment and seduction to shocking horror stories. She meets a man who has been paying for sex for more than 40 years. Known for his reviews of sex workers in brothels across the country, Storm speaks to him in his family home. What drives a married man to use sex workers? She also meets a woman who uncovered shocking secrets when she learned that her cheating partner paid for sex.(n)

programme.title: Ocean's Thirteen (2007)
programme.desc: Danny Ocean rounds up his band of crooks for one last heist. Gang member Reuben has been left traumatised and in a coma after being double-crossed by crooked casino owner Willy Bank, and Danny decides that payback is in order. He plans a scheme that will leave Bank penniless, but needs the help of an old enemy. Comedy crime caper sequel, with George Clooney, Al Pacino, Brad Pitt, Matt Damon, Andy Garcia and Elliott Gould.(n)

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Alexis and Castle's routine flight to London turns deadly when the plane's air marshal is found murdered. With the help of Beckett back on the ground, the duo race against time to find the killer before he carries out his fateful plan. Nathan Fillion, Molly C Quinn and Stana Katic star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the stabbing of a teacher whose body has been found in a caretaker's cupboard. The hunt for her killer leads to the discovery that she was caught up in a love triangle at school involving a student with multiple identities. Legal drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The discovery of a woman's body in the East River leads Briscoe and Green to investigate the drug-addicted brother of a famous footballer - and as the case unfolds, it becomes clear she may not have been the killer's only victim. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green think they have got their man when the prime suspect in a murder investigation knows every detail about the killing. However, when he claims he acquired his information from a psychic vision, the detectives have their work cut out. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A six-year-old boy begs the team to find his father who, he claims, has been kidnapped. The agents learn the missing man is a lieutenant commander working on a confidential project, but their inquiries lead them to believe he disobeyed orders and deleted the information he was sent to acquire.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The bodies of two assassins are delivered to NCIS from overseas - so Tony and Ziva assume their identities and keep a rendezvous at a luxury hotel in a bid to discover who they had been sent to kill. Unfortunately, Gibbs finds out his team is not the only one working on the case. Drama, with Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green look into the shooting of defence lawyer Vance Grodie, who had just won an acquittal for a suspected cop killer. Their investigations reveal a link to a network of conservative extremists, and the discovery leads the case into an examination of civil rights. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Briscoe and Logan face a race against time to catch a serial killer carrying out a series of racially motivated murders. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Christopher Noth.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy man is found dead in his bed, and the team receive an anonymous tip that he was murdered. Logan and Briscoe encounter difficulties at the scene when the widow and her attorney refuse to allow an autopsy. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An undercover police office is killed by McGee while on duty, and Jenny approves an investigation into the death. But the decision places a strain on her relationship with Gibbs as the team tries to prove that the agent was not culpable, despite the evidence building against him. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A model dies while filming a reality TV show at a US Marine base, and an autopsy reveals she was killed by a drug overdose administered by someone else. Inquiries lead the team to identify three possible suspects - but one of them is also murdered. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Lauren Holly.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The murder of a dentist leads Goren and Eames to a company at the heart of a criminal conspiracy involving contaminated mouthwash that has caused the deaths of several children. Establishing a motive for the killing proves difficult - and the detectives begin to suspect they are being manipulated by someone close to the investigation. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is discovered in a bathroom next to the battered corpse of her boyfriend's brother, and immediately becomes the prime suspect in his murder. However, the discovery she is a pre-op transsexual leaves the team with new questions to consider. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A serial rapist represents himself in court and is released on bail, despite his first victim picking him out during an identity parade. Benson and Stabler refuse to give up the chase, but the criminal strikes again, and this time the result is murder. Fred Savage guest stars alongside Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives arrest two students suspected of raping and murdering a cancer patient who grew marijuana in her apartment. The pair blame each other, so the prosecution team is faced with the dilemma of charging the older boy as an adult, despite evidence that he was not mentally capable of carrying out the crimes. Christopher Meloni stars.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A 14-year-old rape victim tries to commit suicide by jumping off an underground platform. As Benson and Stabler search for her attacker, DNA tests unearth a dark family secret involving the two main suspects and the victim's parents. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Christopher Meloni.(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Intelligence investigate an armed bank heist, which leads them to a teenage gang run by an older Fagin-like criminal. A second incident ends in tragedy for Lindsay and another detective from the robbery-homicide division tries to take over the investigation.(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: When an online video shows a man being burned alive, the investigation shows the victim to have been accused of statutory rape - leading the team to believe a vigilante is at work.(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed.(n)

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett, Castle and the team investigate when the creator of a hit sketch comedy series is strangled with his own tie and thrown down a lift shaft.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the death of a female rock singer, who apparently died of an overdose of cocaine and heroin. However, their inquiry is hampered by the appearance of a retired officer using unorthodox research tactics to find out the truth. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The admissions director of an exclusive Manhattan elementary school is bludgeoned to death and Briscoe and Green initially believe she was murdered by a parent determined to have their child enrolled. However, as their investigation continues, a member of the school's staff comes under suspicion. Guest starring Roger Rees, with Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the death of a Russian model, and when the autopsy reveals a host of old injuries they suspect long-term abuse. Further tests are made on the body, and the findings suggest medical malpractice may have been the cause, leading the detectives to track down the person responsible for her death. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Fingerprint evidence implicates Tony in a woman's death and he finds himself accused of murder. Convinced of his innocence, the other members of the team set out to clear him - even though all the facts seem to indicate he is guilty. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An undercover police office is killed by McGee while on duty, and Jenny approves an investigation into the death. But the decision places a strain on her relationship with Gibbs as the team tries to prove that the agent was not culpable, despite the evidence building against him. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baseball star becomes the prime suspect in the murder of his limousine driver, who had been regularly supplying him with steroids. Briscoe and Green's investigation reveals blackmail as the underlying motive for the crime. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The body of a superintendent is found in the basement of his building, leading Logan and Briscoe to suspect his death was the result of a break-in gone wrong. However, forensic evidence points the finger of suspicion at the victim's 17-year-old son, who Dr Olivet believes is an abusive sociopath. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bomb is planted in a Wall Street car park, and a woman is apprehended in connection with the crime. However, Stone and Kincaid work to prove the culprit had been brainwashed by Daniel Hendricks, the charismatic leader of a sinister religious cult. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony and Ziva disappear while searching for smuggled weapons at a shipyard. Gibbs is soon on the case and learns the pair were looking for a freight container thought to hold explosives from Iraq. McGee tries to get a GPS trace on the missing duo's mobiles, leaving the others struggling to find them before they come to serious harm. Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo star.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A commander who knows the location of a shipment of nuclear fuel rods is abducted, and the team is called in to try to identify the kidnapper. However, as the investigation turns up new evidence, it appears someone might have had a very different motive for silencing the officer. Guest starring Zac Efron.(n)

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy, Dov, Gail and Nick take on a risky plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt, while Oliver is still under suspicion.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A waitress is found raped and murdered outside a nightclub, with suspicion falling on her ex-boyfriend. However, the detectives get a new lead when they discover the victim was in an abusive love affair with her boss, while news of her treatment is mistakenly leaked to her father - who vows to take revenge on the attacker. Joe Morton (Law & Order) guest stars, alongside Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl is found murdered, and as detectives investigate the case, it is revealed she is involved in the same charitable foundation as four abduction victims. The scheme is run by a prominent physician who specialises in hormone replacement and perpetuating youth. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A six-year-old girl tests positive for a sexually transmitted disease - and the team turns to her family to trace the paedophile who abused her. However, revelations about the victim's elder sister place Cabot in a tricky situation. Starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Stephanie March.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An infant ingests cocaine that has been mixed into baby food but Internal Affairs blocks the investigation, so the team goes undercover to expose a drug ring run by corrupt cops. Stabler is consigned to desk duty after a major operation takes a turn for the worse and he is forced to shoot a suspect in self-defence. However, Cragen and Benson uncover a smuggling racket as they pursue the case.(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Lindsay's disciplinary hearing is interrupted by a call from her distressed mother to say her boyfriend has been shot dead. However, when it turns out her parent knows more about the crime than was at first believed, Lindsay faces a huge dilemma.(n)

programme.title: Chicago Justice
programme.desc: A high-profile double murder case appears to be the work of a serial killer - which is impossible, since he is in prison. Nagel files a petition for joint custody of her daughter.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a struggling actress in what appears to have been a bungled robbery. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Four murders occur in Manhattan, all of which seem to have been committed by the same sniper. Ty Burrell (Modern Family) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green have their hands full investigating four homicides, including the killing of a husband by his distraught wife and the murder of a woman who had a complex relationship with two brothers. They then have to look into the abduction of an expectant mother. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A model dies while filming a reality TV show at a US Marine base, and an autopsy reveals she was killed by a drug overdose administered by someone else. Inquiries lead the team to identify three possible suspects - but one of them is also murdered. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Lauren Holly.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony and Ziva disappear while searching for smuggled weapons at a shipyard. Gibbs is soon on the case and learns the pair were looking for a freight container thought to hold explosives from Iraq. McGee tries to get a GPS trace on the missing duo's mobiles, leaving the others struggling to find them before they come to serious harm. Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A high-school student is killed by a hit-and-run driver, with tyre marks at the scene indicating it was deliberate. The case is complicated when the chief suspect is murdered by his mother. Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A decomposed skeleton is unearthed on a construction site and identification proves troublesome for Stone. The deceased is eventually revealed to be a man who disappeared years earlier and was presumed murdered. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A teenager beats a fellow foster home resident to death, and his lawyer seeks a not guilty vedict, claiming the youth is genetically predisposed to violent behaviour because he possesses an extra Y chromosome.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The wives of two marines are murdered, and although Gibbs initially suspects they were victims of domestic violence, subsequent developments suggest the case may involve professional killers who already have their next victim in mind. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team suspects a desperate US Marine may have faked his own death with the help of a friend and blown up an ambulance in a botched attempt to cover all traces of the subterfuge. Subsequent developments, including a mysterious disappearance, seem to confirm the hypothesis - until a timely discovery by Abby throws new light on the case.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A recuperating rape victim is abducted from hospital and later found dead, triggering an investigation that takes Benson and the team into the heart of New York's clubland - and eventually to a suspect with a juvenile conviction for assault, torture and murder. Starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.desc: Alex Polizzi heads to Ramsbottom in Greater Manchester to lend her expertise to Charlotte Belcher, who has been running the 14-bedroom Grant Arms Hotel for two and a half years. Despite its attractive, central location, the 19th-century listed venue has developed a bad reputation as a hang-out for a 'rough crowd' - particularly at the bar. With no profits to pay for renovations, Charlotte has enlisted her husband and two children to help turn the Grant Arms around, but her work-life balance is starting to tip drastically away from home, and the beleaguered hotelier hopes Alex will find a way to boost the hotel's income while also restoring her private life.(n)

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong.(n)

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. programme.desc: Sarah Beeny meets first-time developer Martin Sutherland, who plans to convert a run-down three-bedroom flat in Earl's Court into a luxury five-bed apartment in the hope of attracting corporate clients. But his budget is small and so is the building, forcing him to reconsider his lofty ambitions.(n)

programme.title: Danger UXB

programme.title: Daddy Daycare
programme.desc: Three men are sent to work at a north-west London nursery, where father-of-four Grant receives a dressing down from manager Marion after losing his temper with the children. Paul is convinced childcare is easy and his partner Sally is eager for him to understand just how difficult it is, while recruitment consultant Tony's wife Marilyn hopes the experience will prompt him to spend less time working and watching sport and more time with his baby son.(n)

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce looks into the past of Edinburgh's Palace of Holyroodhouse, which is located close to the dormant volcano Arthur's Seat. Events in the royal residence, one of the smallest palaces in Britain, have determined the futures of England, France and Scotland, and it was the last place in which a royal prince challenged the right of an English king to sit on the throne. Fiona also examines objects including the Darnley jewel, which features numerous hidden messages, and the needlework of a doomed queen.(n)

programme.desc: Documentary about crimes against humanity in Syria, featuring first-hand accounts from activists, child protesters and a former army general.(n)

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings.(n)
